message:
feat(core): expand RNA regulatory element detection

- analysis/rna-structure: add RBS (Shine-Dalgarno + start-codon spacing) and rho-independent terminator candidates (stem-loop + U-tract) to RegulatoryHypothesis output.
- Improve synonymous-stress percentile computation by ranking indices instead of doing per-window O(n) scans.
- Deduplicate overlapping regulatory hypotheses and merge basic (RBS/terminator) with existing advanced detectors.
